summary: Implemented admin product listing with auto-approval and 100% revenue to admin wallet, plus mandatory electronic purchase contracts before auction payment. Backend: ProductServiceImpl allows Admin to post without KYC/seller contract, auto-approves and schedules auction; AuctionPaymentServiceImpl routes 100% of final price to admin wallet (ADMIN_AUCTION_REVENUE) for admin-owned listings vs 20/80 split for sellers; requires signed PURCHASE_AGREEMENT before pay; new PurchaseContractPdfService generates buyer purchase PDF with admin pre-signature + buyer signature and auto-filled product/price/party info; ContractService extended with sign/get/has purchase contract; AuctionController added GET/POST purchase-contract endpoints. Frontend: post-item allows Admin (skip KYC), shows admin banner; PurchaseContractPanel component; integrated into auctions detail winner flow and won-items before pay; admin sidebar/dashboard link to post-item; admin contracts filter includes purchase agreements; auth redirect admin to /admin/dashboard.
current_status: Admin can list products via /post-item (auto-approved, scheduled auction, 100% revenue to admin wallet). All auction winners must sign purchase contract PDF before payment; contracts visible in admin /admin/contracts. Restart backend to apply. Test with admin123@gmail.com / 123456.
